message:
test(asserts): [7k7pl batch 2] pin content/shape on 5 non-connector presence-only asserts

Upgrade presence-only assertions to pin exact content + structural
shape across 4 test files, so regressions producing non-empty-but-
wrong values fail loudly instead of slipping past `.is_some()` /
`!is_empty()` probes.

- tests/search_filters.rs (minimal_field_mask_preserves_order):
  replace `!hit.agent.is_empty()` + `!hit.source_path.is_empty()` with
  `assert_eq!(hit.agent, "tester")` and file_name ∈ {strong.jsonl,
  weak.jsonl}, matching the two seeded fixtures.

- tests/search_frankensearch_integration.rs (RRF fusion): replace
  three `.contains()` probes with HashSet equality on expected
  doc_id set {doc_a, doc_b, doc_c}, pinning the exact fused result
  rather than each doc appearing somewhere.

- tests/search_asset_harness.rs
  (injector_partial_build_has_checkpoint_not_ready): pin
  BuildCheckpoint fields seeded by write_partial_build —
  embedder_id=minilm-384, docs_embedded=200,
  conversations_processed=50, total_conversations=100,
  db_fingerprint=fp-partial.

- tests/search_asset_harness.rs (harness_log_jsonl_is_parseable):
  upgrade "valid JSON arrived" probe to assert parsed.phase == "test"
  and parsed.msg == "hello world", catching serializer regressions
  that emit {} or swap field names.

- tests/agent_detection_completeness.rs
  (detect_installed_agents_report_structure): replace
  `!generated_at.is_empty()` with ISO-8601 shape check — len >= 10
  and dashes at positions 4 and 7 (YYYY-MM-DD prefix), so
  "unknown" / epoch-integer regressions fail.

Verified green across all 4 test files (10 + 16 + 55 + 65 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
